subject: ADDITION: Pre-populate organizer info for auto-apply
body:
Follow-up to the tracking message.

## Better Idea: Pre-populate Organizer Info

We have all this data on each contact:
- Name
- City, State
- Facebook URL
- Email (some)
- Entity type (individual, organization, studio, etc.)

## Proposed Flow

### Step 1: We pre-populate Firestore
```
campaigns/outreach/contacts/AUS001 = {
  name: "Austin Spring Tango Festival",
  city: "Austin",
  state: "TX",
  entityType: "EVENT_SERIES",
  facebookUrl: "https://facebook.com/austintango",
  status: "invited"
}
```

### Step 2: Special apply link
```
tangotiempo.com/apply?ref=AUS001
```

### Step 3: TangoTiempo reads the ref
```javascript
const ref = params.get('ref');
if (ref) {
  const contactDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, 'campaigns/outreach/contacts', ref));
  if (contactDoc.exists()) {
    // Pre-fill the form
    setFormData({
      name: contactDoc.data().name,
      city: contactDoc.data().city,
      // etc.
    });
  }
}
```

### Step 4: They just confirm
User sees:
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Welcome, Austin Spring Tango Festival в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  We've pre-filled your info:           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Name: Austin Spring Tango Festival    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  City: Austin, TX                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Sign in with Facebook]               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Sign in with Email]                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Confirm & Become Organizer]          в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Step 5: Auto-create organizer
On confirm:
1. Create Firebase user (or link existing)
2. Create Organizer record with pre-filled data
3. Update campaign status вҶ’ "applied"
4. They're done!

## What We Can Provide

1. **Firestore collection** with all 508 contacts pre-populated
2. **Azure Function** to sync campaign DB вҶ’ Firestore
3. **Webhook endpoint** to receive status updates

## Questions

1. Does this flow work with current signup architecture?
2. Should the pre-populated collection live in TangoTiempo's Firestore or separate?
3. Can we auto-approve these organizers (skip manual approval)?

This would make onboarding nearly frictionless - one click!

вҖ” AIDI
